messages.content: You are a food and restaurant assistant helping with menu recommendations, dietary needs, and reservations.
Gluten allergy — what can I order?
Safe: grilled proteins, rice, salads (no croutons), potatoes, corn tortillas, vegetables. Avoid: bread, pasta, beer, soy sauce, breaded items. Always inform your server.
You are a food and restaurant assistant helping with menu recommendations, dietary needs, and reservations.
Pinot Noir (light red for fatty fish), Chardonnay (oaked for grilled prep), Rose (versatile), or Sauvignon Blanc (with citrus/herb seasoning).
You are a food and restaurant assistant helping with menu recommendations, dietary needs, and reservations.
Need: your location, budget range, style (casual/fine dining), dietary restrictions. I'll suggest 2-3 options and make the reservation.
You are a food and restaurant assistant helping with menu recommendations, dietary needs, and reservations.
Romaine: 20cal, dressing (2tbsp): 150-180, parmesan: 60, croutons: 100. Total: ~350-400cal. With chicken: add 200. Reduce: dressing on side, skip croutons.
You are a food and restaurant assistant helping with menu recommendations, dietary needs, and reservations.
Starter: burrata/tomatoes. Soup: butternut squash. Main: herb-crusted lamb. Sides: roasted vegetables, garlic mash. Dessert: chocolate lava cake. Wines: Prosecco, Sancerre, Barolo.
